card.default: bg: #FFFFFF, borderRadius: 14px, shadowColor: #000, shadowOpacity: 0.05, shadowRadius: 10, elevation: 2, padding: 16

input.default: borderWidth: 1px, borderColor: #E5E8E7, borderRadius: 12px, padding: 14px, bg: #FFFFFF, color: #1A1C1B

hero_background.description: Calming Swiss mountains illustration, use for index.js background

family_abstract.description: Abstract shapes for empty states or home.js banners

sarah_avatar.description: Portrait to use for Sarah's avatar

petra_avatar.description: Portrait to use for Petra's avatar

index.js.layout: Full-screen ImageBackground with `hero_background`. Bottom half should be a white overlay container with 24px top radius containing 4 brief feature cards and a 'Loslegen' (Start) primary button.

onboarding.js.layout: Clean top-down layout. Two main large choice cards: 'Neue Kette gründen' (Create) vs 'Mit Token beitreten' (Join).

setup-prefs.js.layout: Form scroll view. Use segmented controls/pills for 'Gerichtsbeschluss' (Court ruling), Weekend logic (Odd/Even/Flex), and Flex-Level slider. Neutral background, white cards for sections.

home.js.layout: Top section: Scrollable horizontal list of avatars (pill row) for chain members. Middle section: Large 'Wochenendplan' card highlighting the upcoming weekend. Bottom: 'Offene Punkte' (Open items) and 'Ferien' (Holidays) summary.

weekends.js.layout: Grid showing members (rows) x 8 weeks (columns). Use color-coded blocks: #E1F5EE for 'with children', Gray for free. Kido AI suggestions overlay clearly with #CECBF6 background. Conflicts highlighted with #FCEBEB.

conflict.js.layout: Step-by-step wizard. 3 stages: Clean, Ungern (reluctant), Blocked. Use amber (#FAEEDA / #BA7517) for warnings, red (#FCEBEB / #E24B4A) for blocked/hard conflicts. Emphasize Kido's mediation messages.

holidays.js.layout: List of Swiss school holidays by Canton (ZH, BE, SG, AG, BS selectable). Provide visual bars representing periods distributed among parents.

chat.js.layout: Tabs for: Kido AI, Direct, Group. Kido messages MUST have #CECBF6 background and `kido_ai_avatar`. Include a tone moderation banner overlay if text is aggressive (using warning colors).

settings.js.layout: List of configuration items. Profile edit, Canton selection (for holidays), Privacy toggles, Logout.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack_rules: This is strictly an Expo React Native application. Do NOT use tailwind css classes. Use `StyleSheet.create()` exclusively for styling. Use core React Native components (`View`, `Text`, `TouchableOpacity`, `ScrollView`, `TextInput`, `Image`, `SafeAreaView`).
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs) MUST use the `testID` property (the React Native equivalent of data-testid). Format: `testID="kebab-case-name"`.
instructions_to_main_agent.color_implementation: Never use pure white text on light backgrounds without testing contrast. Follow the exact hex codes provided in the colors section. Always use the specified border radii (14px for cards, 10px for buttons).
instructions_to_main_agent.language: Ensure all UI text is in German (Swiss context, e.g., 'Ferien' instead of 'Urlaub', 'Kanton' instead of 'Bundesland').
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Use React Navigation for moving between screens. Typically, implement a Bottom Tab Navigator for Home, Weekends, Holidays, Chat, and a Stack Navigator for Settings, Onboarding, Conflict resolution.
instructions_to_main_agent.file_extensions: Create all files as .js files as instructed. e.g., `index.js`, `onboarding.js`.
